name: Godiva Soufflé Glacé
recipeInstructions:
1. Fold waxed paper or parchment paper pieces lengthwise, spray with vegetable coating, and secure around eight 4-ounce soufflé dishes to make 2-inch standing collars.
2. In a stainless steel bowl over simmering water, whip the eggs, sugar, coffee, and cocoa powder until the mixture is thickened and hangs in the hoop of a wire whisk. Remove from heat.
3. Add vanilla extract and Godiva Liqueur, then cool.
4. Whip the cream until stiff and fold into the egg mixture in four batches.
5. Divide the mixture among six greased soufflé dishes, allowing for a one-inch extension over the top of each dish, and place immediately in the freezer.
6. If enough mixture remains, use to fill the remaining soufflé dishes and freeze as well.
7. To serve, remove the collars and garnish with shaved chocolate.
